reviews.comment:
Me gustaría que se ocupen y preocupen por el perrito negro que tienen afuera, se está muriendo, pobre animal. Cómo pueden ser tan egoístas de no buscarle un mejor lugar, todo  día solo! Está súper flaco y llorando!!!! Es hermoso y bueno.

(Translated by Google)
I would like you to take care of the little black dog you have outside; he's dying, poor animal. How can you be so selfish as not to find him a better place? He's alone all day! He's so thin and crying! He's beautiful and sweet.

reviews.comment:
Es una estación de servicio muy pequeña con pocos surtidores. Pertenece al Automóvil Club Argentino.  Baños en buenas condiciones y limpios. Área de recreo con buena sombra, mesas con bancos y mucho verde. Destaca por los enormes y riquísimos sánguches, probamos el de jamón crudo y manteca y son una delicia. Con uno comen dos abundantemente. La ubicación entre Monte y Las Flores permite para y hacer un buen recreo en el viaje.

(Translated by Google)
It's a very small gas station with only a few pumps. It belongs to the Argentine Automobile Club. The restrooms are clean and in good condition. There's a recreation area with good shade, tables with benches, and plenty of greenery. It's known for its enormous and delicious sandwiches; we tried the prosciutto and butter one, and it was a delight. One is enough to feed two people generously. Its location between Monte and Las Flores makes it a great place to stop and take a break during your trip.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12390827448733246713/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2toVk5FVlBSVTVJY2xWSmJrMHRSRk10UlhCallVRRAB
